apps.name: BrandSnap AI
apps.description: Upload your logo, place it on the canvas, and the AI generates a styled product scene with your mark integrated into the image — then export.
apps.html:
BrandSnap AI

Upload your logo, place it on the canvas, then generate a scene with your mark integrated into the image.

1 Canvas
2 Style
3 Palette
4 Scene brief
5 Mark — upload & place on the canvas
Drag to place · size below · then Generate
